calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust And For Instructions To Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Bassi, via ZOOM, counsel for Mechanics Bank, Successor Trustee.

At the outset, the court advises counsel of its concern with the request to modify the trust so that the Jordan Park cabins are no longer held in the trust when the court previously ordered the cabins continued to be held in the trust. Counsel presented oral argument as to why the court should grant the Petition to Modify Trust and requests that the court take judicial notice of exhibits A and B as presented in petition.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Modify Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions As To: 1. Disposition Of Client Files Of Carl Svenson, Esq.; 2. Closing Of Estate Of Nicholas Ort [Prob C 17200, 730-735 Et Seq.]
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger, Law Practice Administrator, in Propria Persona.

The Court asked if counsel expected Mr. Bassi to appear, asked if he was almost ready and that there was a question regarding the Ort estate. Mr. Voorsanger responded that he did not know if Mr. Bassi would appear, that he is asking for instruction that he has no further duties in that case, that notice has been given to all parties and that he requests an order to such in this case that can be filed in the Ort case. The Court stated that it will take the current petition under submission, that it cannot close the Ort estate via this estate, asked if there would be any further filings in case 230338 and that it will issue an order in this case and take things one step at a time. Mr. Voorsanger stated that he filed a proof of service on Friday and provided a file endorsed copy to the court. The Petition for Instructions, etc., was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christy Styer for Anne Kirueshkin (Successor Trustee).

Ms. Styer spoke of the value of the Trust, the various real properties held in the Trust, the royalty stream, the properties that are being distributed, who is to receive which property, the benefit of having one single Trust, the house on 6th Avenue being listed for sale, outright distribution to Ashley, Natasha and Tatiana (10% each) to be valued on date of distribution, Marina's 50%, Alec's 10% and Samantha's 10% remaining shares going into one trust but being separately accounted for, etc. In addition, Ms. Styer referred to the 1987 instrument and Probate Codes 15411, 16200 and 21118 in support of her petition. The Petition for Instructions was continued to October 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Styer is to file a supplement regarding all of the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Sep-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Law Practice Administrator Re Request For Additional Authority For Payment Of Fees And Costs, For Approval Of Fees And Costs Incurred To Date, And Report Of Status Of Practice Administration
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger Law Practice Administrator in Propria Persona. Victoria Newman (Paralegal) also present.

Mr. Voorsanger explained services provided/performed, stated that this was a very large project, that there was no formal opposition other than the letter from Natalia Ilyin where she takes issue with fee estimates and that she has no standing because she is not a residual Beneficiary. The Petition of Law Administrator Re Request for Additional Authority for Payment of Fees and Costs, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Law Practice Administrator And For Authority To Pay Law Practice Administrator
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Shearer for Anne Kirueshkin (Trustee). Douglas Voorsanger (proposed nominated Practice Administrator).

Mr. Shearer stated that they are not requesting Mr. Voorsanger be paid $20,000.00 in advance, that they are requesting that Mr. Voorsanger perform his work, present bills to Ms. Kirueshkin for her review and then have them approved. The Court stated that it will approve up to $20,000.00 to be paid by Ms. Kirueshkin subject to a petition at conclusion of services (a petition will be required). The Court expressed concern about the 30-day time period for destruction of files. Mr. Voorsanger is to see what the recommendation of the State Bar is, get a better handle on things, use his judgment as to those files that he feels are clear cut and can be destroyed and keep record of what is destroyed. The Court granted the Petition for Order Appointing Law Practice Administrator, etc. (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
